data.name: Hentai Clicker: Selena is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Selena is streaming

Step onto the court of temptation with Selena, your stunning ebony tennis star who plays to win — on and off the field.
Every click makes her sweat, moan, and push her limits as you collect hearts, unlock daring outfits, and discover just how wild her training sessions can get. 💦🎾

🍑 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Selena is streaming blends addictive clicker mechanics with the irresistible charm of a steamy sports fantasy.
Each tap fuels Selena’s energy and arousal, driving her from focused athlete to seductive rival.
Collect hearts to unlock tight sportswear, explicit animations, and flirty voice lines that evolve as the match heats up.

Upgrade your skills, build momentum, and keep the rally going until she’s completely out of breath.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

From sweaty workouts and teasing stretches to full-on erotic matches, Selena brings the intensity of competition into every explicit scene.
Everything is fully animated, uncensored, and designed to make you feel the heat of the game.

🎉 Features

🎾 Ebony Tennis Beauty – Fit, confident, and utterly irresistible.
🎨 High-Quality Anime Visuals – Smooth, dynamic art that brings her power and passion to life.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple, satisfying, and endlessly replayable.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From sporty uniforms to scandalous lingerie.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Moans, gasps, and playful taunts as she gets “in the zone.”
🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Earn hearts, boost stamina, and unlock her wildest fantasies.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you love strong, confident women with a naughty side, Selena will be your ultimate fantasy.
She’s beautiful, fierce, and always ready to play a “different kind of game.” 😈

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap fuels her passion and performance.
🔓 Unlock Erotic Scenes – Use hearts to strip her down and reveal new fantasies.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed up the action and push Selena past her limits.

🎉 Start the Match!

She’s sweating, teasing, and waiting for your next move.
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Selena is streaming and serve your way to the hottest victory imaginable. 💋🎾

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
